pattern: Maintain a stack of unresolved days awaiting a warmer one; each new temperature resolves all colder days still on top by the index distance.
hints: For each day you want the distance to the next strictly warmer day.
A monotonic stack of indices with decreasing temperatures lets you resolve waits as warmer days arrive.
When the current temperature exceeds the top of the stack, pop it and record the index difference as its answer.

edge_inputs.description: strictly increasing has constant distance one
warmer day appears only at the very end

stress.description: random temperatures within the valid band
